  field ColumnBuilder.Builder Builder
  field Conn.ExecQuerier ExecQuerier
  field DeleteBuilder.Builder Builder
  field Driver.Conn Conn
  field Func.Builder Builder
  field InsertBuilder.Builder Builder
  field LockOptions.Action LockAction
  field LockOptions.Strength LockStrength
  field LockOptions.Tables []string
  field LogDriver.Driver *Driver
  field LogTx.Tx github.com/syssam/velox/dialect.Tx
  field NullScanner.S database/sql.Scanner
  field NullScanner.Valid bool
  field OrderExprTerm.Expr func(*Selector) Querier
  field OrderExprTerm.OrderTermOptions OrderTermOptions
  field OrderFieldTerm.Field string
  field OrderFieldTerm.OrderTermOptions OrderTermOptions
  field OrderTermOptions.As string
  field OrderTermOptions.Desc bool
  field OrderTermOptions.NullsFirst bool
  field OrderTermOptions.NullsLast bool
  field OrderTermOptions.Selected bool
  field Predicate.Builder Builder

  field QueryStats.SlowQueries sync/atomic.Int64
  field QueryStats.TotalDuration sync/atomic.Int64
  field QueryStats.TotalExecs sync/atomic.Int64
  field QueryStats.TotalQueries sync/atomic.Int64
  field Rows.ColumnScanner ColumnScanner

  field Selector.Builder Builder

  field StatsSnapshot.SlowQueries int64

  field StatsSnapshot.TotalQueries int64
  field StatsTx.Tx github.com/syssam/velox/dialect.Tx
  field StmtInfo.Dialect string
  field Tx.Conn Conn
  field Tx.Tx database/sql/driver.Tx
  field UpdateBuilder.Builder Builder

  method UpdateBuilder.JoinComma(...Querier) *Builder

  method UpdateBuilder.Limit(int) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.OrderBy(...string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.Pad() *Builder
  method UpdateBuilder.Prefix(...Querier) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.Query() (string, []any)
  method UpdateBuilder.Quote(string) string
  method UpdateBuilder.Reset() *Builder
  method UpdateBuilder.Returning(...string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.S(string) *Builder
  method UpdateBuilder.Schema(string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.Set(string, any) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.SetDialect(string)
  method UpdateBuilder.SetNull(string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.SetTotal(int)
  method UpdateBuilder.String() string
  method UpdateBuilder.Total() int
  method UpdateBuilder.Where(*Predicate) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateBuilder.Wrap(func(*Builder)) *Builder
  method UpdateBuilder.WriteOp(Op) *Builder
  method UpdateBuilder.WriteString(string) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Add(string, any) *UpdateSet
  method UpdateSet.AddError(error) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Arg(any) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Argf(string, any) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Args(...any) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Byte(byte) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Columns() []string
  method UpdateSet.Comma() *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Dialect() string
  method UpdateSet.Empty() bool
  method UpdateSet.Err() error
  method UpdateSet.FromSelect(*Selector) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.Ident(string) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.IdentComma(...string) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Join(...Querier) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.JoinComma(...Querier) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Len() int
  method UpdateSet.Limit(int) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.OrderBy(...string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.Pad() *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Prefix(...Querier) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.Query() (string, []any)
  method UpdateSet.Quote(string) string

  method UpdateSet.S(string) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.Schema(string) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.Set(string, any) *UpdateSet
  method UpdateSet.SetDialect(string)
  method UpdateSet.SetExcluded(string) *UpdateSet
  method UpdateSet.SetIgnore(string) *UpdateSet
  method UpdateSet.SetNull(string) *UpdateSet
  method UpdateSet.SetTotal(int)
  method UpdateSet.String() string
  method UpdateSet.Table() *SelectTable
  method UpdateSet.Total() int
  method UpdateSet.UpdateColumns() []string
  method UpdateSet.Where(*Predicate) *UpdateBuilder
  method UpdateSet.Wrap(func(*Builder)) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.WriteOp(Op) *Builder
  method UpdateSet.WriteString(string) *Builder

  method Wrapper.SetDialect(string)

const LockKeyShare LockStrength
const LockNoKeyUpdate LockStrength
const LockShare LockStrength
const LockUpdate LockStrength
const NoWait LockAction
const OpAdd Op
const OpDiv Op
const OpEQ Op
const OpGT Op
const OpGTE Op
const OpIn Op
const OpIsNull Op
const OpLT Op
const OpLTE Op
const OpLike Op
const OpMod Op
const OpMul Op
const OpNEQ Op
const OpNotIn Op
const OpNotNull Op
const OpSub Op
const SkipLocked LockAction
func And(...*Predicate) *Predicate
func AndFuncs(...func(*Selector)) func(*Selector)
func AndPredicates[P ~func(*Selector)](...P) func(*Selector)
func As(string, string) string
func Asc(string) string
func Avg(string) string
func Column(string) *ColumnBuilder
func ColumnsEQ(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsGT(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsGTE(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsHasPrefix(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsLT(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsLTE(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsNEQ(string, string) *Predicate
func ColumnsOp(string, string, Op) *Predicate
func CompositeGT([]string, ...any) *Predicate
func CompositeLT([]string, ...any) *Predicate
func ConflictColumns(...string) ConflictOption
func ConflictConstraint(string) ConflictOption
func ConflictWhere(*Predicate) ConflictOption
func Contains(string, string) *Predicate
func ContainsFold(string, string) *Predicate
func Count(string) string
func CreateView(string) *ViewBuilder
func Delete(string) *DeleteBuilder
func Desc(string) string
func DescExpr(Querier) Querier
func Dialect(string) *DialectBuilder
func Distinct(...string) string
func DoNothing() ConflictOption
func EQ(string, any) *Predicate
func EqualFold(string, string) *Predicate
func Exists(Querier) *Predicate
func Expr(string, ...any) Querier
func ExprFunc(func(*Builder)) Querier
func ExprP(string, ...any) *Predicate
func False() *Predicate
func FieldContains(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldContainsFold(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldEQ(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldEqualFold(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldGT(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldGTE(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldHasPrefix(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldHasPrefixFold(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldHasSuffix(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldHasSuffixFold(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldInGeneric[T any](string, ...T) func(*Selector)
func FieldInValues(string, ...any) func(*Selector)
func FieldIn[T any](string, ...T) func(*Selector)
func FieldIsNull(string) func(*Selector)
func FieldLT(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldLTE(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldNEQ(string, any) func(*Selector)
func FieldNotInGeneric[T any](string, ...T) func(*Selector)
func FieldNotInValues(string, ...any) func(*Selector)
func FieldNotIn[T any](string, ...T) func(*Selector)
func FieldNotNull(string) func(*Selector)
func FieldsEQ(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldsGT(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldsGTE(string, string) func(*Selector)

func FieldsLTE(string, string) func(*Selector)
func FieldsNEQ(string, string) func(*Selector)
func GT(string, any) *Predicate
func GTE(string, any) *Predicate

func HasPrefixFold(string, string) *Predicate
func HasSuffix(string, string) *Predicate
func HasSuffixFold(string, string) *Predicate
func In(string, ...any) *Predicate
func InInts(string, ...int) *Predicate
func InValues(string, ...database/sql/driver.Value) *Predicate
func Insert(string) *InsertBuilder
func IsFalse(string) *Predicate
func IsNull(string) *Predicate
func IsTrue(string) *Predicate
func LT(string, any) *Predicate
func LTE(string, any) *Predicate
func Like(string, string) *Predicate
func LogWithFunc(func(context.Context, ...any)) LogOption
func Lower(string) string
func Max(string) string
func Min(string) string
func NEQ(string, any) *Predicate
func NewColumnCheck(map[string]func(string) bool) ColumnCheck
func NewDriver(string, Conn) *Driver
func NewLogDriver(*Driver, ...LogOption) *LogDriver
func NewOrderTermOptions(...OrderTermOption) *OrderTermOptions
func NewStatsDriver(*Driver, ...StatsOption) *StatsDriver
func Not(*Predicate) *Predicate
func NotExists(Querier) *Predicate
func NotFuncs(...func(*Selector)) func(*Selector)
func NotIn(string, ...any) *Predicate
func NotNull(string) *Predicate
func NotPredicates[P ~func(*Selector)](...P) func(*Selector)
func Open(string, string) (*Driver, error)
func OpenDB(string, *database/sql.DB) *Driver
func OpenWithStats(string, string, ...StatsOption) (*StatsDriver, *QueryStats, error)
func Or(...*Predicate) *Predicate
func OrFuncs(...func(*Selector)) func(*Selector)
func OrPredicates[P ~func(*Selector)](...P) func(*Selector)
func OrderAs(string) OrderTermOption

func OrderNullsLast() OrderTermOption

func PredicateNot[P ~func(*Selector)](...P) P
func PredicateOr[P ~func(*Selector)](...P) P

func ResolveWithIgnore() ConflictOption
func ResolveWithNewValues() ConflictOption

func ScanSlice(ColumnScanner, any) error

func ScanTypeOf(*Rows, int) any

func SelectExpr(...Querier) *Selector
func Sum(string) string

type BoolField[P PredicateFunc] string
type Builder struct
type ColumnBuilder struct
type ColumnCheck func(table string, column string) error
type ColumnScanner interface
type ConflictOption func(*conflict)
type Conn struct
type DeleteBuilder struct
type DialectBuilder struct
type Driver struct
type EnumField[P PredicateFunc, T ~string] string
type ExecQuerier interface
type Float64Field[P PredicateFunc] string
type Func struct
type InsertBuilder struct
type Int64Field[P PredicateFunc] string
type IntField[P PredicateFunc] string
type LockAction string
type LockOption func(*LockOptions)
type LockOptions struct
type LockStrength string
type LogDriver struct
type LogOption func(*LogDriver)
type LogTx struct
type NullBool = NullBool
type NullFloat64 = NullFloat64
type NullInt64 = NullInt64
type NullScanner struct
type NullString = NullString
type NullTime = NullTime
type Op int
type OrderExprTerm struct
type OrderFieldTerm struct
type OrderTerm interface
type OrderTermOption func(*OrderTermOptions)
type OrderTermOptions struct
type OtherField[P PredicateFunc, T any] string
type ParamFormatter interface
type Predicate struct
type PredicateFunc interface
type Querier interface
type Queries []Querier
type QueryStats struct
type Result = Result
type Rows struct
type SelectTable struct
type SelectValues map[string]any
type Selector struct
type SlowQueryHook func(ctx context.Context, query string, args []any, duration time.Duration)
type StatsDriver struct
type StatsOption func(*StatsDriver)
type StatsSnapshot struct
type StatsTx struct
type StmtInfo struct
type StringField[P PredicateFunc] string
type TableView interface
type TimeField[P PredicateFunc, T any] string
type Tx struct
type TxOptions = TxOptions
type UUIDField[P PredicateFunc, T any] string
type UnknownType interface
type UpdateBuilder struct
type UpdateSet struct
type ViewBuilder struct
type WindowBuilder struct
type WithBuilder struct
type Wrapper struct
